name: 克莱门特·卡斯特
name_full: 克莱门特·卡斯特 Clemente Castor

last_movies.title: La sonrisa no cabe en mi rostro
Atados los años engullen la tierra

introduction: Clemente Castor Reyes received support from FONCA to study film at the Sarajevo Film Academy. He also studied Latin American Literature at the Universidad Iberoamericana. He is part of the SOMA educational program for contemporary artists. He is co-founder of the distribution and production company Salón de Belleza. His videos and short films have been part of various festivals and exhibitions such as the Morelia International Film Festival, the UNAM International Film Festival, FICGuanajuato, and the Festival del Puerto, among others. PRINCE OF PEACE (2019) is his debut feature film. His newest film, COLD METAL (2025), has been selected for FIDMarseille.
